title: FIRE + U-Net sigmoid skips

input.brief: Adds shortcut wires connecting the early layers straight to the later layers in a U-shape, each with a soft on/off dial, so useful information can skip ahead. Already finished - its numbers are in the results below.

expected_output.summary: Structured result with metrics and artifacts.

public_summary: Adds shortcut wires connecting the early layers straight to the later layers in a U-shape, each with a soft on/off dial, so useful information can skip ahead. Already finished - its numbers are in the results below.
